label_notes: Source: training knowledge. DoorDash collects real-time location data and order history. Privacy practices focused on service delivery and fraud prevention. Extensive sharing with Dashers and merchants is necessary for service operation. Does not sell personal data but shares with service providers and partners. Updated with available information as of knowledge cutoff Feb 2025.
